item.title: Iran directly threatens Trump
item.description: Iranian officials say that when they announced death to America, they meant death to the American government and policies of tormenting those overseas not the American people!
item.dc:creator: wafflesdidit

item.title: Every morning and night I send my adult kids a handful of funny & uplifting memes, dad jokes, warnings about cats, advice, words of encouragement, a theme song of the day, and weird shit. Here’s 50 of the top of the sent pile. Enjoy.
item.description:
Best dad joke win ever. The kids get a major shot on National tv, and end up repeating your dad jokes.
Beware the cats
Beware the cats
Cats beware
Beware the cats
Beware the cats. They’ll trick you into renovating your home (like my kids’ cats are doing now).
Two of my kids are welders. They thought this was awesome.
Foxes are dogs with cat software. Beat cats at their own game.
You’ve got to constantly watch them. They’re always up to something.
I hope you feel like dancing with your friends today.
I hope you feel like being goofy with your friends today.
I hope you feel like dancing with your friends today.
This is true.
I have this mower. Luckily I have no moose. ?
item.dc:creator: Wheretheheckisjason

item.title: New York’s subway has a rule that dogs must be “carried in a bag” when entering, which has unintentionally turned the regulation into a kind of creativity contest among New Yorkers.
item.dc:creator: kenistod

item.title: It's less impressive knowing I was using an 8 week program though...
item.description: So many years ago I purchased an app called Zombies Run 5k at the recommendation of my older sister. Zombies Run 5k is an 8 week program that each week is 3 days. It tells the story about you being found outside the Abel compound where you're recruited to become a runner, which is a person that runs into the surrounding area to find supplies, but before you officially become one, you have to train to increase your stamina. Unfortunately in all the time owning it ive never finished it. I'd pick it up, get about 3-4 weeks into the program, then stop. Pick it back up, rinse and repeat. But for the first time, I'm on week 8. Friday is my very last one and it's supposed to be my first 5k. So today on day 2 of week 8, it had you do 3 sets of runs, with 2 being 10 minutes straight and one being 5 minutes, with some 5 minute walks in-between to cool off a bit. The very first run while still being fresh, for the first time ever I jogged for just shy of 10 minutes straight without stopping and I'm fucking proud of myself. Every week as I continue my fitness journey as a middle aged dude, something has changed in me mentally as everytime I've gone down this path, I haven't been able to make it stick for more than a few months. TLDR: I'm making progress in my workouts.
item.dc:creator: PepperoniAndFingernailPizza

item.title: Fourteen weeks without any selfharm
item.description: Been a hell- week, BUT, today i got to start on a new antidepressant, and i somehow feel hope. I know it will take seveal weeks until i will maybe feel changes, and it also may get worse before it gets better, i still feel hopeful.
item.dc:creator: dotnote

item.title: Trump's horrific advice may have just gotten people killed
item.description: BREAKING: Trump's "advice" to oil tankers: "Show some guts, sail through Hormuz anyway." Iran's response: Tanker decimated, fire raging in the Persian Gulf. This isn't leadership — it's playing with lives for ego points. How many more have to die? #TrumpIrresponsible #HormuzDisaster #IranWar #WakeUpAmerica Quote-tweet your thoughts — follow for unfiltered truth
item.dc:creator: MEOWnews

item.title: Phone-clearing dump 416
item.description:
I refuse to believe that not everyone does this. Why wouldn’t you want your mouth to remember the best part?
Valid.
You know why you got beef. They told your ride or die that they dress weird. There’s no way back now.
Badam tssssss
Kicksled parking in Northern Sweden
Womp womp
Your husband is right
This is a video. Why isn’t it playing.
Straight to jail
Sure

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1636 (chateauGPT)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Ehhh, that's more like Sedona soil
Pippin tax Today's message from Pippin: "fuck you. Oh Pippin." ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Jen Psaki: Trump calls the Iran War a "short term excursion"
item.description: For some reason I'm reminded how on "Gilligan's Island" it went from: "For a three hour tour, a three hour tour" – to: "They're here for a long, long time".

26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @AnthonyChristopherArt gave us a peek into his sketchbook. Absolutely fantastic. Check out their posts for more awesomeness.
27 Man Tax: Chris Pratt
“The need for mystery is greater than the need for an answer.” - Ken Kesey So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator
